data.title: BTQ Technologies included in VanEck Quantum Computing ETF
data.description: Quantum-resistant cryptography company BTQ Technologies Corp. announced its inclusion in VanEck's Quantum Computing UCITS ETF, a European-listed ETF that provides diversified investment exposure to companies driving quantum computing research, development, and applications. The ETF tracks the MarketVector Global Quantum Leaders Total Return Net Asset Value Index (MVQTMLTR), whose portfolio includes 30 companies selected for their quantum computing operational exposure or verified quantum patent ownership, with total net assets of approximately $524.5 million. (PRNewswire) Previously, BTQ Technologies launched the "Bitcoin Quantum" testnet, where miners, developers, researchers, and users can stress-test quantum-resistant transactions.

data.title: Bitget launches a new episode of CandyBomb
data.description: Bitget has launched a new round of CandyBomb, with a total prize pool of 160 SOL. Participants can earn up to 0.72 SOL by completing specific contract trading volume tasks. Detailed rules have been published on the official Bitget platform. The event ends on January 23, 2026 at 16:00 (UTC+8).

data.title: BSC Meme coin, a dark horse in the cryptocurrency market, briefly surpassed $8 million in market capitalization, with a 433.1% increase in the first hour.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the market capitalization of BSC Meme coin briefly exceeded $8 million, currently trading at $7.14 million, a 433.1% increase in the first hour. Odaily reminds users that Meme coin prices are highly volatile, and investors should participate with caution.

data.title: BNY Mellon CEO: Trump administration's pressure on the Federal Reserve backfired
data.description: The CEO of Bank of New York Mellon stated that the Trump administration's pressure on the Federal Reserve has backfired. (Jinshi)

data.title: Zcash Developers Resign, Plan New Company After Board Dispute
data.description:
The Electric Coin Company staff resigned after a board dispute and plan a new company, while Zcash operations remain unaffected.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/cryptocurrencies/zcash-developers-resign-plan-new-company-after-board-dispute/

data.title: ClearBank has partnered with cryptocurrency custodian Taurus and plans to join the Circle payments network.
data.description: UK-based clearing bank ClearBank has announced a partnership with cryptocurrency custodian Taurus to support its stablecoin services. ClearBank will use Taurus-PROTECT as its wallet infrastructure provider, enabling it to offer digital asset services, including MiCAR-compliant USDC and EURC, in a secure, scalable, and compliant manner. This move is reportedly part of ClearBank's plan to join the Circle payments network, a stablecoin issuer. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Binance Alpha lists Dark Horse and Laozi
data.description: According to the official page, Binance Alpha has listed Black Horse and Laozi.

data.title: Analysts: Crypto market rebound lacks momentum; Bitcoin needs to hold above $95,000 to confirm its upward trend.
data.description: IG analyst Chris Beauchamp stated that the cryptocurrency market is gradually recovering, but gains remain limited due to continued investor caution and ongoing outflows from crypto funds. He pointed out that the lack of new capital inflows needed for a strong price rebound means Bitcoin must hold above $95,000 to confirm a sustained upward trend. Currently, the market's focus is on US inflation data, bank earnings reports, and the upcoming Senate hearing on the structure of the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Bitcoin’s strategic role in light of developments in Venezuela
data.description:
Venezuela developments highlight Bitcoin’s growing role as a neutral hedge and strategic reserve asset amid geopolitical fragmentationThe article Bitcoin’s strategic role in light of developments in Venezuela was first published on Crypto Valley Journal.

data.title: BNB Chain targets ‘around one second’ finality with Fermi hard fork
data.description:
BNB Chain’s Fermi hard fork goes live on Wednesday, cutting BSC block times from 0. 75 seconds to 0. 45 seconds and tightening fast-finality rules.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bnb-chain-fermi-upgrade-faster-block-times-finality?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Kazakhstan plans to freeze 20,000 money laundering cards and shut down 22 underground cryptocurrency exchange locations by 2025.
data.description: Kazakh President Kassym-Jomart Tokayev received a briefing from the Financial Supervisory Service (AFM) on its 2025 work, which included the completion of investigations into 1,135 criminal cases, compensation of 141.5 billion tenge to victims, dismantling of 15 criminal gangs and 29 platforms engaged in illegal cash-out schemes with transactions exceeding 128 billion tenge, cracking down on the activities of 22 underground cryptocurrency exchanges used for money laundering in drug trafficking and fraud, and shutting down over 1,100 illegal online cryptocurrency trading services and 20,000 deposit cards used for money laundering. (Tengrinews)

data.title: U.S. December CPI Impact on Gold Prices Analyzed
data.description:
According to Odaily, market analysts suggest that if the U.S. December Consumer Price Index (CPI) released tonight is significantly lower than expected, it could lead to a rapid strengthening of gold prices due to anticipated interest rate cuts. If the CPI is slightly lower, gold prices may maintain a bullish trend and rise gradually. Should the CPI meet expectations, the market is likely to remain stable, with gold prices consolidating at high levels while awaiting further signals.

Conversely, if inflation exceeds expectations, particularly with a rise in core inflation, an increase in real interest rates could cause a short-term decline in gold prices. However, if the scenario of "high interest rates combined with persistent inflation" evolves into concerns about stagflation, gold may attract stronger safe-haven buying in the medium term.

data.title: Democrats strike back: BlueVault platform targets crypto donors
data.description:
Democrats are trying to win back cryptocurrency voters with a new fundraising tool that went live this week, hoping to reverse the damage from their crushing defeat in last November’s election. BlueVault started taking Bitcoin and stablecoin donations on Monday for Democratic political committees. The launch comes as party insiders worry they’ve lost ground with […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/democrats-bluevault-targets-crypto-donors/

data.title: Survey: 80% of US CEOs say Trump's pressure on Powell to cut interest rates is not in the best interest of the United States.
data.description: Jeffrey Sonnenfeld, founder of the Yale Institute for CEO Leadership, points out that privately, American CEOs are "deeply shocked" by the government's attacks on the Federal Reserve. Sonnenfeld and his colleagues found that among the 200 CEOs they surveyed, 71% believed the Trump administration had eroded the Fed's independence, and 80% said Trump's pressure on Powell to cut interest rates was not in the best interests of the United States. And all of this occurred even before they learned of the Justice Department's investigation into Powell. (Jinshi)

data.title: Selini Capital withdrew 500,000 HYPE tokens from the CEX and pledged them to HyperCore.
data.description: According to MLM monitoring, Selini Capital withdrew 500,000 HYPE tokens (approximately $12.1 million) from OKX about 16 hours ago, and pledged all the funds to HyperCore about 6 hours later.

data.title: Analysis: If tonight's December US CPI is significantly lower than expected, the anticipated interest rate cut may push gold prices higher.
data.description: Based on comprehensive market analysis, if tonight's December US CPI is significantly lower than expected, the anticipated interest rate cut will drive gold prices up rapidly; if it is slightly lower, gold prices will maintain a bullish trend and fluctuate upwards; if it meets expectations, the market will remain inactive, with gold consolidating at high levels and awaiting the next signal; however, if inflation is higher than expected, especially if core inflation rebounds, the rise in real interest rates will suppress gold prices in the short term. But if the combination of "high interest rates + sticky inflation" continues to evolve into concerns about stagflation, gold may actually attract stronger safe-haven buying in the medium term.

data.title: A newly created wallet deposited 3.6 million USDC into HyperLiquid and opened a 10x long position in ZEC.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a newly created wallet deposited 3.6 million USDC into the HyperLiquid trading platform and opened a 10x leveraged long position in ZEC (Zcash). Currently, the wallet also has additional buy orders in the range of $400 to $401.

data.title: Polymarket currently reports a 40% probability that Kevin Warsh will be elected Federal Reserve Chairman.
data.description: According to Polymarket data, Kevin Warsh's probability of being elected Federal Reserve Chair is currently 40% (up 6%), Kevin Hassett's is 38% (up 7%), Christopher Waller's is 9% (down 6%), and Rick Rieder's is 7% (up 6%). Furthermore, Rick Rieder will meet with Trump and Bessant on Thursday to discuss his nomination for Federal Reserve Chair.

data.title: Bitcoin meets gold in the UK: 21Shares brings BOLD fund to London
data.description:
The 21Shares Bitcoin Gold ETP allocates roughly two-thirds to gold and one-third to Bitcoin and now trades in pounds sterling and dollars on the London Stock Exchange.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/21shares-bold-etp-bitcoin-and-gold-exposure?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: A whale betting on ETH increased its holdings by 1299.6 ETH again after a week.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, a whale betting on ETH has increased its holdings by 1299.6 ETH again after a week. Five minutes ago, it withdrew ETH from OKX at $3129.64. Since December 5, 2025, the total number of ETH it has accumulated has increased to 51,451.6, with a total value of $161 million and an average cost of about $3117.3. It is currently experiencing a floating loss of $940,000, and compared with the short-term high of ETH last week, its floating profit has withdrawn by more than $9 million.
